title: cymbidium wilsonii
intro: Cymbidium wilsonii is a species of orchid, commonly known as the Wilson's cymbidium, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium wilsonii include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures to make teas, tonics, and other remedies that promote respiratory health.
